apps.name: Swipe Todos
apps.description: Swipe Todos is a simple task management app for creating, organizing, and completing personal to-do items.
dataCollected: Account information, such as email address, display name, authentication provider, and user ID
Optional profile photo if you choose to upload one
Task content you create, such as task title, description, priority, tags, category, due date, reminder time, status, and completion history
App preferences and automation rules you configure inside Swipe Todos
Limited technical data processed by Firebase and Google Play services to operate authentication, storage, database, security, and app distribution features
thirdParties: Google Firebase Authentication for email, anonymous, and Google sign-in
Google Cloud Firestore for storing your tasks, settings, and rules
Google Firebase Storage for optional profile photos
Google Play services and Google Play Store for app distribution and platform security
Expo notification APIs for scheduling reminders on your device
permissions: Notifications permission, used only to show task reminders when you enable reminders
Photo library permission, used only when you choose to upload a profile photo
